name: Data Transfer Size Limits Evasion
description: Detects exfiltration broken into small chunks to evade size-based detection
query:
// Detect chunked exfiltration to same destination
// Trigger on many small transfers to the same external IP
events from ndr_flow
where direction = "outbound"
  and bytes_sent > 1000
  and bytes_sent < 50000
group by source_ip, destination_ip
having count(*) > 100
within 600 seconds
